dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Tinh day di, Kien Truc Su. Tran chien sinh ton trong 60 giay dau tien cua cau trong Ma Tran da bat dau.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Hay dung Ky nang A - [Nhan Luc Gia Toc]. Duy tri toc do phim bam (APM) len muc 1.0 thao tac/phut de mo khoa tam nhin cho khoi thu 1 sap rot.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Va Ky nang B - [Nhan Luc Tich Diem]. Cay du 50 diem Karma trong vong 60 giay de be khoa khoi thu 2. Chuc may man!

dialogues.speaker: Cyan
dialogues.text: Lua chon sang suot. Viec cau co gang sinh ton bang cach don dep gon gang o giai doan truoc da chung minh cau co to chat cua OrderCorp. Su hon loan tam thoi duoc day lui.

dialogues.speaker: Cyan
dialogues.text: Nhung ngu canh gio da khac. Ma Tran dang tang toc do roi. Su hoan hao cua cau se bi thu thach duoi ap luc khong lo cua Thanh Vuc.

dialogues.speaker: Cyan
dialogues.text: Ky nang moi cua cau: Ky nang A - [Thanh Quang Toc]. Cau co 90 giay de dat moc > 1.2 thao tac/phut. Anh sang se soi roi khoi NEXT dau tien cho cau.

dialogues.speaker: Cyan
dialogues.text: Ky nang B - [Cong Duc Tich Tu]. Xoa dong de tich luy du 100 EXP trong 90 giay, diem sang thu hai se xuat hien tren man hinh.

dialogues.speaker: Cyan
dialogues.text: Tuy nhien, de thang hoa thanh Thanh Than o kiep sau, hay chu y dieu kien an: giu chuoi clear sach va co gang dat moc 20 diem cot truyen tong. Dung pham sai lam.

dialogues.speaker: Zed
dialogues.text: Haha! Quyet dinh hay day! Viec mi hoang loan xep chong khoi len nhau o phut truoc cho thay mi thuoc ve Tang Day. Su thanh tay chi la tro lua dao cua bon nha giau!

dialogues.speaker: Zed
dialogues.text: Chao mung den bai rac. Bau troi sap trut xuong nhung khoi hinh di dang. Ap luc vat ly o day se nghien nat nhung ke choi cham chap.

dialogues.speaker: Zed
dialogues.text: Ky nang A cua mi gio la [Cuong No Toc]. Hay giu toc do tay > 1.2 thao tac/phut trong 90 giay de ngui thay mui khoi rac dau tien!

dialogues.speaker: Zed
dialogues.text: Ky nang B - [Huyet Ma Diem]. Cu xep combo bua bai! Khi dat 100 diem trong 90 giay, mi se ep Server phun ra hinh khoi thu hai!

dialogues.speaker: Zed
dialogues.text: Nghe cho ro day! De tro thanh Chua Te thuc su, mi phai kich hoat dieu kien an: co tinh Game Over dung luc, roi cay nat 20 diem bao loan. Dam lam khong?

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Cau da tu choi ca Anh Sang lan Bong Toi. Viec cau co tinh lach qua cac goc lag o man truoc chung to cau da nhin thay Su that cua Ma Tran.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Buoc vao Khong Gian Ao nay, luc hap dan khong on dinh. Khoi hinh co the xuat hien bat thinh linh. Truc giac la thu duy nhat cuu song cau.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Dung Ky nang A - [Bong Mo Chuyen Dong]. Giu APM > 1.2 trong 90 giay, ke ho khong gian se cho cau thau thi khoi thu nhat.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Dong thoi, Ky nang B - [Co Ngu Di Thuong]. Khi dat 100 diem T-Spin an trong 90 giay, cau se be khoa khoi thu hai.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Dung tham lam diem so thong thuong. Hay chu y dieu kien an: giu truc giac on dinh, va dat moc 20 diem ky thuat. Neu khong thoa man chung, cau se ket o day mai mai.

dialogues.speaker: Cyan
dialogues.text: Hanh trinh truoc cua cau ket thuc trong su sup do cua buc tuong pixel, nhung 200 EXP cau de lai da thanh tay toan bo server. Cau da chon tai sinh thanh Anh sang.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ngu canh cuoi cung. Muc trong luc toi da 20G. Cac khoi hinh se cham day ngay khi xuat hien. Khong con thoi gian de suy nghi.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ky nang A thang cap: [Than Toc Tinh Hoa]. Ta co 20 giay ngan ngui de ep APM > 1.5, qua do hack thang vao ma nguon de thay khoi thu ba.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ky nang B thang cap: [Karma Tuyet Doi]. Dung 200 EXP, rao can UI se bi pha vo de hien khoi thu tu.

dialogues.speaker: Cyan
dialogues.text: Thach thuc cuoi cung: Ngai phai duy tri trang thai nay va khong vi pham dieu kien an: giu nhip thanh tay on dinh. Neu that bai, su Tuyet Diet se nuot chung chinh ngai!

dialogues.speaker: Zed
dialogues.text: Qua tuyet voi! Mi da loi dung cai chet! 20 lan Game Over o kiep truoc khong giet duoc mi, ma 200 diem tich tu da bien mi thanh mot con Virus hoan chinh!

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Server dang run ray. Ngu canh nay la Man Hinh Tu Than (Kill Screen). Moi khung hinh deu dang giat lag vi rac du lieu.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ky nang A: [Phan Xa Quy Du]. Trong 15 giay tich tac, APM phai vuot 1.5 de an cap ma hex cua khoi thu ba truoc khi no load xong.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ky nang B: [Diem Chet Chong Chat]. Nuot 200 diem loi he thong, ta ep bung bet khoi thu tu!

dialogues.speaker: Zed
dialogues.text: Coi chung! Thach thuc cua mi la khong duoc de RAM cua may chu tran bo nho qua nhanh. Giam sat dieu kien an: khong de nguong RAM vuot qua an toan, neu khong game se vang (Crash) thuc su!

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Tuyet dinh. Cau da vuot qua kiep truoc bang cach bien 200 diem va dieu kien an: do chinh xac tuyet doi thanh chia khoa be khoa gioi han xung nhip CPU. Khong ai co the bat kip cau nua.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ngu canh nay... Thoi gian da dong bang. Thuat toan RNG khong con tu sinh ra khoi, ma no cho ta ra lenh.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ky nang A: [Buoc Nhay Thoi Gian]. Chi can 20 mili-giay voi APM > 1.5, ta da dung o tuong lai va thay khoi thu ba.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Ky nang B: [Tich Luy Hu Vo]. Luong 200 diem an xuat ra tu hu khong da be khoa luon khoi thu tu.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Thu thach lon nhat cua Bac Thay la su vo cam. Hay giu dieu kien an: ty le chinh xac tuyet doi. Mot sai lam nho trong dong chay nay, thoi gian se nghien nat cau ngay lap tuc.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Thu thach 30 giay cuoi cung da khep lai. Du ho dat APM 0.0 hay MAX diem 0...

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: ...Thi bo nho 8-bit cung da can kiet. Mat ta doc duoc thuat toan... nhung he thong da tu choi phan hoi. Mot cai ket duoc lap trinh san cho su cuc doan.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Gioi han sinh ton vo han khong con y nghia. APM 0.0 va Diem so 0 da hoa lam mot vao truc giac.

dialogues.speaker: T-Spin
dialogues.text: Dung vay. Trang thai Flow State. Cau khong danh bai tro choi, cau da tro thanh vong lap cua no. Che do Endless bat dau.

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: Dat moc 999999 tuyet doi! Pha vo moi dieu kien an!

dialogues.speaker: MC
dialogues.text: He thong da bi ep xung den muc tran bo nho. Luoi dien ma tran sup do. Chung ta... cuoi cung da duoc tu do khoi tro choi nay.
